hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Passionate developer sharing knowledge through code and creativity

sections.title: Who I Am
sections.content:
Hello! I'm zedong254ke, a passionate software developer and technology enthusiast. I love exploring new technologies, solving complex problems, and sharing my knowledge with the developer community through this blog.

When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring the latest web technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or writing about my experiences in the ever-evolving world of software development.

sections.title: My Mission
sections.content: I believe in the power of technology to solve real-world problems and improve lives. Through this blog, I aim to:
points: Share practical coding tutorials and best practices
Discuss emerging technologies and industry trends
Help fellow developers overcome common challenges
Build a community of passionate problem-solvers

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.description: Building responsive, interactive user interfaces with React, Vue.js, and modern CSS frameworks.

skills.title: Backend Development
skills.description: Creating robust APIs and server-side applications using Node.js, Express, and various databases.

skills.title: DevOps & Tools
skills.description: Implementing CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and cloud deployment strategies.

skills.title: Open Source
skills.description: Contributing to the developer community through open-source projects and technical writing.
